name: Production Docker validation
commands_or_entrypoints: docker build --file backend/Dockerfile --tag aeroassist-ci-backend:${{ github.sha }} backend;|;|;|;|;|;|;|;|;|;|;|;|;|

name: Fast validation
commands_or_entrypoints: python3 -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt;npm ci --prefix frontend;git diff --check "$(git hash-object -t tree /dev/null)" HEAD;python3 -m compileall -q backend;cd backend && python3 -c "from build_phase import CURRENT_BUILD_PHASE, phase_is_at_least; assert phase_is_at_least(CURRENT_BUILD_PHASE, 'phase_56_5_8_final_stabilization_pilot_release_gate'); assert phase_is_at_least('phase_56_10_example', 'phase_56_9_example')";python3 backend/scripts/validate_smoke_inventory.py;python3 backend/scripts/validate_ci_foundation.py;python3 backend/scripts/validate_persistence_query_foundation.py;python3 backend/scripts/validate_observability_foundation.py;python3 backend/scripts/validate_final_stabilization_pilot_release_gate.py;python3 backend/scripts/smoke_persistence_scalability_tenant_query_hardening_foundation.py --static;python3 backend/scripts/smoke_observability_diagnostics_performance_telemetry_foundation.py --static;python3 backend/scripts/smoke_final_stabilization_pilot_release_gate.py --static;python3 backend/scripts/smoke_pilot_operations_release_readiness.py --static;python3 backend/scripts/smoke_production_evidence_pilot_sign_off_completion.py --static;|;|;python3 backend/scripts/smoke_mongodb_security_backup_disaster_recovery_foundation.py --static;cd backend && python3 -c "import smoke_inventory, server; print(server.app)";python3 backend/scripts/check_production_readiness.py;npm run build --prefix frontend

name: Full smoke regression
commands_or_entrypoints: python3 -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt;npm ci --prefix frontend;python3 backend/scripts/run_pilot_release_validation.py --profile full --output "${{ runner.temp }}/pilot-release-validation.json"

name: Focused smoke validation
commands_or_entrypoints: python3 -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt;|;|;|;python3 backend/scripts/run_smoke_inventory.py --ci-suitable-only --tier static --result-json "${{ runner.temp }}/static-smoke-results.json";python3 backend/scripts/run_smoke_inventory.py --ci-suitable-only --tier focused --result-json "${{ runner.temp }}/focused-smoke-results.json";|
